title: epicranthes haniffii
intro: Epicranthes haniffii, a rare and endemic orchid species found in the Philippines, is a type of terrestrial orchid belonging to the genus Epicranthes. Traditionally, this plant is used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Epicranthes haniffii are said to include wound healing, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical treatment.
